query: SELECT o.slug, o.name, COUNT(f.id) as file_count FROM organizations o JOIN intakeFileAttachments f ON f.organizationId = o.id GROUP BY o.slug, o.name ORDER BY file_count DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT o.slug, o.name, COUNT(f.id) as file_count FROM organizations o JOIN intakeFileAttachments f ON f.organizationId = o.id GROUP BY o.slug, o.name ORDER BY file_count DESC LIMIT 5
